projects.name: ai-autoresponder
projects.description: AI-powered multi-platform auto-responder that handles messages across Facebook, Instagram, Telegram, and WhatsApp. Production app with ~20 downloads. Has Android native conversion roadmap with Play Store appeal in progress.
projects.last_context: Discussed server issues and Play Store submission. Decided to fix authentication bug before release.

projects.name: guardian-anti-theft
projects.description: Android anti-theft security application with Firebase backend and web-based admin panel. Originally named "SecurePhone". Production-ready with APK builds and admin dashboard. Needs UI/feature updates.

projects.name: hajj-kafela
projects.description: Hajj and Umrah package booking platform with bilingual support (Bengali/English). Serves ~40 clicks/day. Admin panel for managing packages, photo albums, and prayer times. Deployed on Vercel with MongoDB and ImageKit for media.

projects.name: wordsnest
projects.description: IELTS vocabulary learning Android application with OCR scanning, word search, and analytics. Uses MVVM + Repository pattern with Firebase backend. Includes admin panel deployed on Netlify. Currently has server issues and broken AI features.
